name: Miside: “Sleepy mita and her girlfriend”
description:
ITS NEVER BEEN THIS PEACEFUL IN THE REAL WORLD HUH?

The world isn’t all so bad when your in a virtual one... without the feeling other Mitas are around but who cares, you’re her girlfriend of a sleepy one!

Interact with her and see what you can do with her, although maybe not much but who said you can’t pester her while she sleeps?

Who knows what’ll happen...
creator: Lilithness
